item_type:
Bell notification : ON
Real-time showing notification: OFF
description: Testing bell notification system's display, behavior, and functionality with real-time notifications disabled.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check default display of notification
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value
expected_result: Display correctly as designed

test_view_points.viewpoint: When not have notification
expected_result: Notification is not displayed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification is sent when other people have commented on post of yourself
+ Account A sends comment to account B once /several times
+ Account A likes activity of account B /several times
+ Account A shares activity of account B /several times
expected_result:
+ Account B display bell notification
+ Account A not display bell notification
+ Number of notification can increase each time send comment/like/share
+ Content of notification is correct
+ Real-time showing notification is not displayed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification is not sent when you have comment on post of yourself
+ Account A send comment to account A
+ Account A liked activity of account A
+ Account A shared activity of account A
+ Account A unlike account B
+ Account A unlike and re-like account B
expected_result: Not display notification

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification is sent when other people have comment on post of another person ( you have already commented/ liked/shared that post OR which you are tagged in that post)
+ Account A send comment to you
+ Account A liked your activity 
+ Account A shared your activity
expected_result:
+ You see bell notification
+ Account A not display bell notification
+ Number of notification can increase each time send comment/like/share
+ Content of notification is correct
+ Real-time showing notification is not displayed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification is sent when other people have comment on post of another person ( you have already commented/ liked/shared that post OR which you are tagged in that post)
+ Account A send comment to another person
+ Account A liked activity of another person
+ Account A shared activity of another person
expected_result:
+ You see bell notification
+ Account A not display bell notification
+ Number of notification can increase each time send comment/like/share
+ Content of notification is correct
+ Real-time showing notification is not displayed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check quantity of notification decrease when that notification has been read
+ When there is 1 notification and user read notification
+ When there are many notifications and user read each notification
expected_result: Number of notification is decreased properly when notification is read

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check quantity of notification is unchanged when notification is not read
+ When there is 1 notification and user does not read notification
+ When there are many notifications and user does not read any notifications
expected_result: Number of notification is unchanged

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check sending of notification when 
+ When receive notification from 1 account
+ When receive notification from multi accounts
+ When receive notification from multi accounts at the same time
expected_result:
+ Quantity of notification is correct
+ Each notification displays correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification list
+ Display of list
+ Order của notice
+ Limit of the number in the list
+ "See All" button
expected_result:
+ Notification list displays properly
+ Notifications are sorted in correct order
+ Number of notifications are limited as spec
+ When click See All button, alert icon disappear
Notification list is removed

description: Testing the real-time notification system's display, behavior under various conditions including user interactions, system states, and external interruptions.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check default display of notification
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value
expected_result: Display correctly as designed

test_view_points.viewpoint: When not have notification
expected_result: Notification is not displayed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification is sent when other people have commented on post of yourself
+ Account A send comment to account B
+ Account A liked activity of account B
+ Account A shared activity of account B
expected_result:
+ Account B display notification popup
+ Account A not display notification popup
+ Number of notification can increase each time send comment/like/share
+ Content of notification is correct

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification is not sent when you have comment on post of yourself
+ Account A send comment to account A
+ Account A liked activity of account A
+ Account A shared activity of account A
expected_result: Not display notification

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification is sent when other people have comment on post of another person ( you have already commented/ liked/shared that post OR which you are tagged in that post)
+ Account A send comment to you
+ Account A liked your activity 
+ Account A shared your activity
expected_result:
+ You see notification popup
+ Account A not display notification popup
+ Number of notification can increase each time send comment/like/share
+ Content of notification is correct

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification is sent when other people have comment on post of another person ( you have already commented/ liked/shared that post OR which you are tagged in that post)
+ Account A send comment to another person
+ Account A liked activity of another person
+ Account A shared activity of another person
expected_result:
+ You see notification popup
+ Account A not display notification popup
+ Number of notification can increase each time send comment/like/share
+ Content of notification is correct

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check quantity of notification decrease when that notification has been read
+ When there is 1 notification and user read notification
+ When there are many notifications and user read each notification
expected_result: Number of notification is decreased properly when notification is read

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check quantity of notification is unchanged when notification is not read
+ When there is 1 notification and user does not read notification
+ When there are many notifications and user does not read any notifications
expected_result: Number of notification is unchanged

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check sending of notification when 
+ When receive notification from 1 account
+ When receive notification from multi accounts
+ When receive notification from multi accounts at the same time
expected_result:
+ Quantity of notification is correct
+ Real-time showing notification is displayed seperatedly with proper display for customer to Check

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check notification sending when user is offline/logging out
expected_result: When user online/loggin in, can check notification properly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check notification sending when user is working on another tab (not on tab of that web)
expected_result: Notification is displayed properly at correct position of screen

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check notification sending when browser window is minimized, showing desktop only
expected_result: Notification is displayed properly at correct position of screen

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification sending when
+ Set a notication pushing before a deadline

Ex: Notification displays 5 minutes before meeting
      Notification displays when an events starts
expected_result: Notification is displayed properly at correct position of screen

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check notification sending when
1. After receive notification, user click ignore button
2. Do action to send notification again
expected_result: Notification is displayed properly at correct position of screen

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click on notification when receiving
expected_result: It redirects to correct page

item_type: Check display of notification whether it is conflicted with notification of other software/app
description: Testing notification display behavior when competing with other system notifications and window states.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check real-time showing notification when 

+ There is another window/screen/popup displaying at the right corner
+ There is notification of another software/web displaying at the right corner
expected_result: Real-time showing notification is not overlapped by other windows/screen/popup/notification

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check real-time showing notification when 

+ Set the window of the testing web with small size
+ Minimize the window of the testing web
expected_result: Real-time showing notification is displayed correctly at the right corner

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Do action to display notification 1
2. Click a button in that notification, but not close notification yet
3. Do action to display notification 2
expected_result: Button in notification 2 is displayed correctly as default

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Do action to display notification 1, notification 2
Ex: From other PCs, send message to testing account
2. When notification 1 displays, click button "Not show notification any more"
3.Check notification 2
expected_result:
1. Notification 2 is displayed / or not displayed the same as spec

2. If notification displays, it displays at correct position as spec for customer to Check that notification

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Do action to display notification 1
2. At the time notification 1 display, lock the pc
3. Check notification display
expected_result:
1. Notification 1 is displayed / or not displayed the same as spec

2. If notification displays, it displays at correct position as spec for customer to Check that notification

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Do action to display notification 1
2. At the time notification 1 display, have trouble with internet connection
3. Connect internet again
4. Check notification display
expected_result:
1. Notification 1 is displayed / or not displayed the same as spec

2. If notification displays, it displays at correct position as spec for customer to Check that notification

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Do action to display notification 1
2. At the time notification 1 display, have a phone call / a message
3. Get phone call
4. Check notification display
expected_result:
1. Notification 1 is displayed / or not displayed the same as spec

2. If notification displays, it displays at correct position as spec for customer to Check that notification
